citations.description: Ticket comments array is empty: no Gerrit change URL, no vote outcome, no submission record found in ticket db8c-4ae1-4598-446b.

findings.criterion: The change lands on `main` through Gerrit with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 (submitted).
findings.detail: This is an operator-attested criterion requiring a concrete attestation (Gerrit change URL/id, recorded votes, and submission timestamp) as evidence. The ticket has zero comments and no recorded artifacts — no Gerrit change reference, no vote record, and no submission evidence. The criterion cannot be judged met.
findings.remediation: Record a comment on the ticket with: the Gerrit change URL/id, the LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 vote outcomes (reviewer names or automated job IDs), and the submission timestamp confirming the change was merged to main.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
